creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text: qt5-webkit is going away (as it is unmaintained) at the end of the calendar year; I'd prefer not to land changes in it with potential impact in languages I don't speak, just ahead of getting rid of it entirely. Any consumers of qt5-webkit should be looking at porting to something else, rather than worrying about Ruby 3.2 compatibility of a deprecated web browser.
